text: I feel a quiet curiosity as I enter this modern, glass-walled space. The clean lines and orderly surroundings spark a reflective mood in me—I'm drawn to question what happens within these transparent boundaries. Upon moving further and confronting the vivid R+D wall, my sense of curiosity deepens, tinged with excitement. The interplay of bold colors, thought-provoking words, and digital displays makes me aware of the fruitful tension between human creativity and technological advancement. There is a feeling of anticipation here, as if I am on the threshold of ideas in formation.
